summary: Iteration 2 focused re-test after main-agent fixes. All targeted bugs from iteration_1 are resolved. Backend: ran 9 focused pytest cases (admin login, reports/latest, reports/history, reports/{id}, ideas, scores, macro, deliveries, run-sync skip_llm) — 9/9 PASSED in ~16s. Frontend: logged in as admin, validated all newly-added data-testids (nav-stocks, nav-history, prefs-save-btn, sector-chip-<Sector>), confirmed the /history alias route renders Report History, exercised save-preferences flow end-to-end (toggled sector-chip-Banking + clicked prefs-save-btn → 'Preferences saved' toast observed), and sanity-checked Stock Explorer.
critical_code_review_comments: utils/clean() correctly handles dict/list/tuple/ObjectId and drops any top-level _id recursively — good central fix. Consider also serializing datetime to ISO string for uniformity if any legacy docs ever lack the Pydantic encoder path.
routes/reports.py history() still does summary.pop('macro', None) before clean(); fine, but consider projecting that out of the DB read instead to reduce bytes over the wire.
No regression: /reports/latest and /reports/{id} also use clean() now — consistent and defensive.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all targeted testids + alias route + save flow verified)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created in this iteration; reused data from iteration_1 run-sync. One run-sync?skip_llm=true invocation executed by pytest TestRunSync (success).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 2 closed out the two blockers from iter1: (1) /api/reports/history ObjectId 500 — fixed via new /app/backend/utils/__init__.py clean() helper applied in routes/reports.py; (2) missing testids (nav-stocks, nav-history, prefs-save-btn, sector-chip-*) and missing /history alias route in App.js — all present and working. Full pytest suite is at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (36 cases). Telegram/Gmail correctly remain in DRY-RUN (unchanged). No outstanding issues.

rca of the issue.bug_from_prev_iter: GET /api/reports/history returned 500 due to nested bson.ObjectId inside report_run doc that projection did not strip
rca of the issue.fix_applied_by_main_agent: Added /app/backend/utils/__init__.py::clean() — a recursive sanitizer that converts ObjectId→str, drops any key literally named '_id', and descends through dicts/lists/tuples. routes/reports.py now wraps every returned doc (history, latest, {id}, run-sync) with clean(doc).
rca of the issue.verification: pytest TestReports::test_history now PASSES; browser confirms /reports (nav-history) and /history (alias) render the Report History page without error.
